name: Lifelike Motions
label: Lifelike Motions
description:
Adds idle behaviors that make the actor feel alive when no
animation is playing: breathing, blinking, micro-movements,
and eye contact.


## Eye Contact

When enabled, the actor looks at cameras, other actors, or
body parts within a configurable visual angle. **Look At
Camera**, **Look At Peers**, and **Look At Body** set the
relative priority of each target type. **Eye Contact Head
Turn** controls how much of the gaze is done by rotating the
head versus just the eyes (real humans turn their head about
70% of the way).

**Cartoon Eyes** reduces eye rotation amplitude for models
with oversized anime eyes so they don't roll out of the
sockets; **Cartoon Eyes Limit** sets the reduction amount.
**Stare Mode** locks onto the closest target instead of
shifting gaze naturally. **Smile Mouth** and **Smile
Eyebrow** add subtle expression while making eye contact.


## Shape Morph Eye Control

An alternative to bone-based eye rotation that uses blend
shapes (morphs) instead. Enable the toggle and assign
morphs for each gaze direction (Left Eye Left, Left Eye
Right, etc.). **Left Right Range** and **Up Down Range**
set the blend shape activation angles.


## Breathing

Simulates chest expansion during breathing by subtly
rotating the torso and neck bones. **Breath Rate** controls
the speed of the cycle.


## Micro Move

Adds tiny random rotations to the head and torso to prevent
the actor from looking completely frozen. **Extent** scales
the amplitude; **Cycle** sets the oscillation period.


## Blink

Random blinking at 2–10 second intervals. **Blink Duration**
controls how long each blink takes.

values.name: Eye Contact
values.label: Eye Contact
values.description: Enable eye contact, look at and turn head towards camera or other models when they are in visual range

descriptions.ja: 視線範囲内のカメラまたは他のモデルにアイコンタクトし、頭を向けさせることを有効にする
descriptions.zh-TW: 在可視範圍內，開啟眼神交流、注視並朝向攝影機或其他模型轉動頭部
descriptions.ko: 시야 범위 내의 카메라나 다른 모델을 바라보고 고개를 돌려 눈맞춤을 활성화
descriptions.zh-CN: 在视觉范围内，启用眼神交流，看向并转头朝向相机或其他模型

values.name: Stare Mode
values.label: Stare Mode
values.description: Constantly looking at the closest target in range.

descriptions.ja: 範囲内の最も近いターゲットを常に凝視する。
descriptions.zh-TW: 始終注視範圍內最近的目標。
descriptions.ko: 범위 내에서 가장 가까운 대상을 지속적으로 응시합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 持续看向范围内最近的目标

values.name: Look At Camera
values.label: Look At Camera
values.description: Priority of cameras as gaze target

descriptions.ja: 視線ターゲットとしてのカメラの優先度
descriptions.zh-TW: 攝影機作為注視目標的優先級
descriptions.zh-CN: 相机作为注视目标的优先级

values.name: Look At Peers
values.label: Look At Peers

labels.ja: 他のキャラクターを見る

values.description: Priority of other models as gaze target

descriptions.ja: 視線ターゲットとしての他のモデルの優先度
descriptions.zh-TW: 其他模型作為注視目標的優先級
descriptions.zh-CN: 其他模型作为注视目标的优先级

values.name: Look At Body
values.label: Look At Body
values.description: Priority of certain body parts as gaze target

descriptions.ja: 視線ターゲットとしての特定の体の部位の優先度
descriptions.zh-TW: 身體特定部位作為注視目標的優先級
descriptions.ko: 시선 대상으로서 특정 신체 부위의 우선순위
descriptions.zh-CN: 特定身体部位作为注视目标的优先级

values.name: Eye Contact Angle
values.label: Eye Contact Angle
values.description: Angle of visual range, only objects within this angle can be gaze target

descriptions.ja: 視界の角度。この角度内にあるオブジェクトのみが視線ターゲットとなり得る。
descriptions.zh-TW: 可視範圍的角度，只有此角度內的物體才能成為注視目標
descriptions.ko: 시야 범위 각도. 이 각도 내에 있는 객체만 응시 대상이 될 수 있습니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 视觉范围角度，只有在此角度内的对象才能成为注视目标

values.name: Eye Contact Head Turn
values.label: Eye Contact Head Turn

labels.ja: アイコンタクト時の頭の向き

values.description: Ratio of head turn when looking at target

descriptions.ja: ターゲットを見る際の頭の向きの比率
descriptions.zh-TW: 注視目標時頭部轉動的比率
descriptions.ko: 대상 응시 시 머리 회전 비율
descriptions.zh-CN: 查看目标时的头部转动比例

values.name: Cartoon Eyes
values.label: Cartoon Eyes
values.description: Reduce eye rotation, useful for models with big cartoon eyes

descriptions.ja: 目を回転させるのを減らす。大きなカートゥーン目を持つモデルに有用。
descriptions.zh-TW: 減少眼部旋轉，對於有大卡通眼睛的模型很有用
descriptions.ko: 눈 회전 감소. 큰 만화 눈 모델에 유용합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 减少眼部旋转，适用于具有大卡通眼睛的模型

values.name: Cartoon Eyes Limit
values.label: Cartoon Eyes Limit

labels.ja: カートゥーン目の制限

values.description: How much rotation reduction in cartoon eyes mode

descriptions.ja: カートゥーン目モードでの回転の減少量
descriptions.zh-TW: 卡通眼睛模式下的旋轉減少程度
descriptions.ko: 만화 눈 모드에서 회전 감소 정도
descriptions.zh-CN: 卡通眼睛模式下的旋转减少量

values.name: Blink
values.label: Blink
values.description: Automatically blink eyes at random interval

descriptions.ja: ランダムな間隔で自動的にまばたきを行う
1回あたりのまばたきの持続時間

labels.ja: シェイプモーフィングによる目の制御
マイクロムーブメント

descriptions.ja: マイクロムーブメントの追加

labels.ja: マイクロムーブメント範囲
マイクロムーブメントサイクル
